newsitems.title: Steam Summer Sale NOW ON!

newsitems.contents:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/31721797/1e3916978db493e7d2af3dfbffee8b65bae4c70d.png[/img]

Greetings!
 
☀️ The Steam Summer Sale is so hot right now 🥵 From today until the 13th of July, grab up to 85% off a selection of Total War titles.
 
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1142710/Total_War_WARHAMMER_III/
https://store.steampowered.com/app/214950/Total_War_ROME_II__Emperor_Edition/

newsitems.title: Medieval 3 may be on the way, but how many characters can you name in Creative Assembly's masterpiece, Total War: Three Kingdoms?
newsitems.author: Sean Martin
newsitems.contents: Us Total War fans are eating good at the moment; we've got Total War: Medieval 3, Total War: Warhammer 40,000, and a hefty End Times update for Total War: Warhammer on the way. These all might still be a ways off, but it's exciting to know there are big Total War games on the horizon and, however fun Pharoah Dynasties was, no more of these small saga games... Read more.
